name: Apparatus Dual Wave
pitch: Two columns of text names flanking a center image. Names slide horizontally along a sine wave as you scroll, flanking a center image that swaps source to match the active viewport item.

lifecycle.idle: Text items breathe with micro-sine wave horizontal fluctuations
lifecycle.discovery: Staggered text reveal with character-split slide-in
lifecycle.buildUp: Scroll scrubs sine wave phase shifts, driving items to slide left and right dynamically
lifecycle.peak: Active item locks at viewport center with distinct typography highlight and full image resolution
lifecycle.recovery: Sine wave phase settles back to default state as scroll decelerates
